title: ExchangePoints
description: Locations in a transport network where fixed-route and flexible services connect, enabling passenger interchange.

exchangePointType.description: Type of exchange point (e.g. FIXED_TO_FLEX, FLEX_TO_FLEX)

connectingServices.description: Services that connect at this exchange point

id.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment stop

instructions.description: Instructions for passengers at this stop

time.description: Expected time window at this stop
